comments: Approved. The drafted contract is materially consistent with the M5-A recon packet and properly constrains implementation to path resolution hardening inside src/mcp-server/src/index.ts. The allowed_files list contains only src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, and the scope text limits the code change to replacing fragile path.resolve(__dirname, "...") usages with a PROJECT_ROOT/process.cwd()-based root. That aligns with the recon evidence in index.ts: WORKFLOW_STATE_PATH, the projectRoot used by verify_execution_compliance/get_execution_diff, and dispatchPath are the identified fragile path-resolution sites. The out_of_scope clause is also correct and sufficiently strict: it explicitly forbids deleting legacy Python scripts, matching the recon decision to preserve scripts/ assets for deprecation assessment only, and it explicitly forbids implementing state mutators or auto-approval logic. No contract language was found that broadens implementation beyond read-only path resolution changes in index.ts.
